title: Readiness Audit, Prior-Skill Retrieval, and Evidence Baseline · Evidence Triage
summary: A preserved decision record for readiness audit, prior-skill retrieval, and evidence baseline contains one plausible evidence, scope, design, implementation, evaluation, or ownership defect. Find the first unsupported claim before changing the product. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in mastery baseline and project readiness ledger and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causa…
objectives: Map prior competencies to observable behaviors, dated artifacts, evidence strength, and unresolved gaps before selecting a product.
Distinguish reusable evidence, practice residue, generated output, sensitive material, and unsupported claims in an existing work sample.
Reproduce one prior behavior under a changed input, environment, or constraint and retain its exact pass or failure evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# personal-project-1 cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: personal-project-1
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Competency Inventory
steps.instruction:
debug case — A learner claims independent mastery from guided exercises, but a changed environment breaks the artifact and the evidence ledger has no dated reproduction. The debug variation 5 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Map prior competencies to observable behaviors, dated artifacts, evidence strength, and unresolved gaps before selecting a product.

Inspect the Competency Inventory trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Inspect the failure record · Debug Competency Inventory.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for map prior competencies to observable behaviors, dated artifacts, evidence strength, and unresolved gaps before selecting a product. For Inspect the failure record · Debug Competency Inventory, keep Competency Inventory connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: For Competency Inventory, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: For Inspect the failure record · Debug Competency Inventory, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Competency Inventory precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Inspect the failure record · Debug Competency Inventory, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A learner claims independent mastery from guided exercises, but a changed environment breaks the artifact and the evidence ledger has no dated reproduction. The debug variation 5 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Map prior competencies to observable behaviors, dated artifacts, evidence strength, and unresolved gaps before selecting a product.

For Inspect the failure record · Debug Competency Inventory, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Course completion badges prove every underlying skill remains retrievable.

stimulus.title: Competency Inventory case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A learner claims independent mastery from guided exercises, but a changed environment breaks the artifact and the evidence ledger has no dated reproduction. The debug variation 5 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Map prior competencies to observable behaviors, dated artifacts, evidence strength, and unresolved gaps before selecting a product.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Course completion badges prove every underlying skill remains retrievable.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Map prior competencies to observable behaviors, dated artifacts, evidence strength, and unresolved gaps before selecting a product. Artifact under review: mastery baseline and project readiness ledger.

options.text: Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Competency Inventory, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the inspect the failure record evidence boundary.

  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]

steps.title: Publish the incident record · Debug Evidence Ledger
